positive: A symmetrical, high-contrast, highly detailed illustration featuring an interwoven pattern of bioluminescent flora and constellations. The central composition features stylized, mystical celestial bodies (moons, stars) flowing into delicate, winding root systems and glowing ferns. Use a deep indigo and sapphire blue color palette accented by luminous teal and soft gold accents. Style should be modern scientific illustration meets sacred geometry, utilizing clean vector lines, strong negative space, and a silhouette-like clarity perfect for screen printing on apparel. The overall mood is ethereal, harmonious, and deeply natural. Highly intricate, central focus, perfect for textile printing.
